node.title: Microsoft OA ||  Chances for Interview Callback

article.title: Microsoft OA ||  Chances for Interview Callback
article.content:
Hi leetcoders,

Recently I gave Microsoft hackerrank OA for an L60 role. There were 2 questions.

I was able to solve 1 completely and for another 1, I was able to pass 11 test cases out of 15.

How much chances are there that I will be selected for the interview?

post.content: Hi, I have an OA scheduled. Can you please share the hackerrank questions you got in your OA round?\n\n
hey i also have my oa round in two days could you plz tell questions that were asked and also the one that were asked to ur peers
My Recruiter told me that.. you should score at 70% to get an interview call. I think you are good.

what was the jobId? the first ques, i am guessing you were getting TLE, even i had the same issue, 11/15, but then after a few optimisation using heap, was able to pass all\nsecond ques was from string if i am not wrong?\n
you will definitely get the call for Interview.
tell the level of questions and type
